Emily Johnson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated customer service representative with over 3 years of experience in retail and hospitality. Strong communication skills and a commitment to providing excellent service. Seeking to leverage my experience in a new role, although I have limited exposure to dock work and freight operations.

Experience
Customer Service Associate  
Walmart Supercenter, Atlanta, GA  
March 2020 - Present  
- Provided assistance to customers in a high-volume retail environment.  
- Handled transactions, returns, and inquiries, ensuring customer satisfaction.  
- Collaborated with team members to maintain store organization and cleanliness.  

Barista  
Starbucks, Atlanta, GA  
June 2018 - February 2020  
- Prepared and served coffee beverages while providing exceptional customer service.  
- Maintained a clean and welcoming environment for customers.  
- Assisted in inventory management and ordering supplies.

- CPR and First Aid Certified
